visual_analysis: The interactive application exhibits a clean and modern design, with a well-organized layout. The color palette and typography are visually appealing, facilitating an easily navigable interface, although it could benefit from a bit more contrast to enhance clarity.
educational_analysis: The application presents an educational concept—dynamic arrays—clearly with relevant instructional elements. However, while it has potential, the clarity of the learning objectives and some instructional prompts could be enhanced for better pedagogical effectiveness.
